text: I feel curious and alert as I move through this modern, brightly lit space. The transparent glass and visible fire safety equipment remind me of our dependence on both clarity and precaution. Entering the vivid "R + D" exhibition prompts thoughts about the evolving relationship between humans and technology; there is an air of anticipation, as if the displays are inviting me to reconsider what it means to innovate and connect. I'm inspired, but with a tinge of existential awe.
